mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.password, u.phonenumber, u.email, u.avatar, u.level_id, l.level_code, l.level_name, u.review_eligible, u.trial_eligible, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.pwd_update_date, u.create_time, u.update_time from shop_user u left join shop_member_level l on l.level_id = u.level_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from shop_user where user_name = #{username} and del_flag = '0'
select level_id, level_code, level_name, level_order, badge_tone, is_default, status from shop_member_level where status = '0' order by level_order
select count(1) from shop_member_level where level_id = #{levelId} and status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into shop_user (user_name, nick_name, password, level_id, review_eligible, trial_eligible, status, del_flag, pwd_update_date, create_by, create_time) values (#{userName}, #{nickName}, #{password}, #{levelId}, #{reviewEligible}, #{trialEligible}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, sysdate(), #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_user set login_ip = #{loginIp}, login_date = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'

update shop_user
nick_name = #{nickName}, avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = sysdate()
where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
update shop_user set password = #{password}, pwd_update_date = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
update shop_user set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
update shop_user set level_id = #{levelId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
